channel.title: About on Runqiu Ye
channel.description: Recent content in About on Runqiu Ye

item.title: About Me
item.description:
I am an undergraduate student in Carnegie Mellon University. I am interested in Mathematics, Computer Science, and Physics. Specifically, I am passionate about analysis, machine learning, and computer systems. I also like doing sports, cooking, and listening to classical music.

On this website, I will share stuff I found interesting relevant to Mathematics, Computer Science, and Physics, mostly containing my notes and projects.
